title: One thing I love about Shadows of Brimstone!
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S0W7nQ2q3Kg

---

Daniel (@dungeondive) highlights the expansive bestiary as the standout feature of Shadows of Brimstone — a game that excels where so many dungeon crawlers stumble by offering a huge variety of enemies with genuinely different abilities, strategies, and tactics needed to overcome them. Having a good bestiary makes each game session feel distinct, and Shadows of Brimstone delivers that in abundance once you build up your collection.
